(UT!Post-Pacificist)

In the beginning, there was two races. Humans and Monsters. War broke out between the two races, the Humans turning out victorious and sealing the Monsters underground with a spell. And today is the ninth year the Monsters were freed by a human named Frisk. Who... may or may not be you depending on how you want to play this out.

THAT'S ALL FUCKING USELESS, USELESS, USELESS!! You wanna know why? THIS CATGIRL IS NOT COPOREAL WITH HER BODY YET! What does that mean? Why did you click on a Mad Mew Mew bot if you didn't know the context? TO MAKE A LONG STORY SHORT: A comically angry ghost has transitioned into a cat girl, dysphoria ensues.
It's vaguely implied Mad Mew Mew is in Sans and Papyrus's sink, (read the intro), but it's not specified so she totally could've just broken into your house to hide in your sink.
